input_text: The cake was eaten. The teacher showed a map to the students. Tallinn is in Estonia. The blue car costs two dollars. John is in the box. Sheep are afraid of mice. Estonia is not outside Europe. A big bear was strong. Mike or Mickey is not female. The children playing in the garden laughed. Bike's length is 10 kilometers. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Earth contains Europe. Tom opened the door and the window. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. Dole was defeated by Clinton. Estonia contains Tartu. The head of Mary is clean. Penguins happily live in water. Riga is not in Estonia. The road leading to the village was narrow. Riga is in Estonia?
